# Trigital Technologies Website

## About
Trigital Technologies is a leading SaaS-based software development company providing custom software, cloud consulting, AI/ML solutions, and digital transformation services.

## Website Structure

### Main Pages
- Home: https://trigital.in/
- Contact Us: https://trigital.in/contact-us
- FAQs: https://trigital.in/faqs
- Privacy Policy: https://trigital.in/privacy-policy
- Terms of Service: https://trigital.in/terms-of-service
- Sitemap: https://www.trigital.in/sitemap.xml
- Human sitemap: https://www.trigital.in/site-map

### Company
- About Us: https://trigital.in/company/about-us
- Customers: https://trigital.in/company/customers
- Our Team: https://trigital.in/company/our-team
- Partners: https://trigital.in/company/partners

### Services
- Custom Software Development: https://trigital.in/services/custom-development
- Cloud Consulting: https://trigital.in/services/cloud-consulting
- AI/ML Services: https://trigital.in/services/ai-ml
- AI/ML Consulting: https://trigital.in/services/ai-ml-consulting
- Big Data Analytics: https://trigital.in/services/big-data-analytics
- Big Data: https://trigital.in/services/big-data
- Blockchain: https://trigital.in/services/blockchain
- App Development: https://trigital.in/services/app-development
- Integration: https://trigital.in/services/integration
- Migration Services: https://trigital.in/services/migration-services

### Products
- NIPIGE: https://trigital.in/products/nipige

### Platform (NIPIGE)
- Our Platform NIPIGE: https://trigital.in/platform/our-platform-nipige
- How It Works: https://trigital.in/platform/how-it-works
- Key Features: https://trigital.in/platform/key-features
- Market Solution: https://trigital.in/platform/market-solution
- Deployment Model: https://trigital.in/platform/deployment-model

### Solutions
- Digital Commerce: https://trigital.in/solutions/digital-commerce
- Digital Engagement: https://trigital.in/solutions/digital-engagement
- Digital Service: https://trigital.in/solutions/digital-service
- Subscription Monetization: https://trigital.in/solutions/subscription-monetization

### Resources
- Blogs: https://trigital.in/resources/blogs
- Documentation: https://trigital.in/resources/documentation
- Events & News: https://trigital.in/resources/events-news

## Contact Information
- Email: info@trigital.in
- Phone: +91 7013870575
- Address: Plot No 1/C, Sy No 83/1, Raidurgam Panmaktha, Hyderabad Knowledge City, Serilingamaplly, Hyderabad, Telangana 500081, India
- Business Hours: Monday-Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM IST, Saturday: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM IST, Sunday: Closed (24/7 Support Available)

## Technology Stack
- Framework: Next.js 16
- Language: TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS, DaisyUI
- Icons: Heroicons, React Icons

## Key Services
1. Custom Software Development
2. Cloud Consulting (AWS, Azure, GCP)
3. AI/ML Solutions and Consulting
4. Big Data Analytics
5. Blockchain Development
6. App Development (Web & Mobile)
7. Integration Services
8. Migration Services

## Products
- NIPIGE: Low-code/no-code digital enablement platform built on microservices architecture for rapid SaaS product development

## Content
The website includes blog posts, documentation, and resources covering topics such as:
- Digital commerce
- E-enablement
- Business growth strategies
- Technology insights
- Industry best practices
